summary: The source details 2012-2013 email correspondence between Elon Musk and Jeffrey Epstein regarding potential social visits and party invitations. It contains no professional frameworks, mental models, or business principles, focusing entirely on personal logistics and Musk's later public statements defending his association with Epstein.

signature_quotes.text: I’ve been working to the edge of sanity this year and so, once my kids head home after Christmas, I really want to hit the party scene in St Barts or elsewhere and let loose.
signature_quotes.context: Explaining his desire to attend a wild party rather than a peaceful island experience during the 2012 holidays.
